title: Pan-Seared Smoked Haddock with Crispy Korean Skillet
description: A flavorful and satisfying dish that combines the richness of smoked haddock with the crunch of a Korean-inspired skillet.
instructions: Season the smoked haddock fillets with korean chili flakes.
Heat the vegetable oil in the skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the smoked haddock fillets for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
Remove the haddock from the skillet and set aside.
Add the crispy kimchi to the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes, or until heated through.
Stir in the green onions, sesame seeds, soy sauce, brown sugar, and rice vinegar.
Return the haddock to the skillet and toss to coat with the Korean-inspired sauce.
